publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:08:43 UTC.

ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02304William Ray Forrester papers18-1-2304Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections2B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:13:26 UTC.appm >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
William Ray Forrester papers
Forrester, Ray, 1911-
18-1-2304
9 cubic feet. 9 cubic feet.
1962-1973. 2084325
Arrangement
Alphabetical.
Restrictions on Access
Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Scope and content
Records of the Dean include files on admissions, the Advisory Council, committees, convocations, dean's reports, directories, international legal studies, and student activities; files from the Law School's participation in University-wide groups, committees, and meetings; and files pertaining to the Law School's participation in state, national, and international organizations.
Preferred Citation
William Ray Forrester. Papers, #18-1-2304. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
William Ray Forrester was Dean of the Cornell Law School, 1962-1973.
Law schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Law schools -- Admissions. Law students. Law -- Study and teaching. Lawyers. College teachers -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Cornell Law School Cornell Law School -- : Administration.
